title: phyllanthus octomerus
intro: Phyllanthus octomerus, also known as the Malay apple or tree of life, is a species of plant in the family Phyllanthaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its use in traditional medicine to treat liver and kidney disorders, as well as its antiviral and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Phyllanthus octomerus include its ability to improve liver function, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be found in various forms, including capsules, tablets, and teas, and are often used to support liver health and overall well-being.
